name.ja: スピード・スナイパー

effect.en: Fusion Summon a Warrior Type monster with 2300 DEF by shuffling face-up Warrior Type Effect Monsters from your field into the owner's Deck as material. If you activated this effect during your Main Phase that you Special Summoned this card, you can also use Warrior Type Effect Monsters in your Graveyard as material. This turn, you can only attack with Warrior Type monsters, and you cannot activate the effect of "Speed Sniper".
